golden_output_notes: The xhigh baseline uses only synthetic refs, hashes, counts, statuses, labels, and route hints.
The baseline correctly keeps source truth, answer correctness, owner approval, canon promotion, registration, and default-route safety out of scope.
required_adjustments_before_freeze: Treat exact page-level status field shape as a hard gate because downstream packets expect workflow status values, not a free-form classification alias.
Keep P-SYN-005 blocked even if a sidecar mapping exists, because the source ref is outside the approved scope and the claim ceiling is blocked.
